task1_reproduce_a55.note_window: A55 used [0.85, 0.90]e-10; strict Planck +/-1sigma is [0.866, 0.878]e-10. Both counts shown.

task6_reassessment.sensitivity_interpretation: 4/9 M1/M2 ratio values yield any viable grid points; viability requires M1/M2 >= ~0.35 x r_ref (threshold behaviour). At ref ratio (M1/M2=r_ref), viable fraction = 0.68% on 1024-pt grid.
task6_reassessment.note: 1024-pt fraction in [0.5%, 2%]; comparable to A55's 1.37%; viability confirmed with non-trivial measure; 55% holds.
